title: Jeff Stedi's Building Modpack
description: Jeff loves building forever and so do you
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e2ae872b756c04fe116a490fa0f731873f17e37.png)

If you want to just build big things with no requirement to explore more than how much exploration vanilla minecraft demands, this modpack is for you. This is a semi-curated selection of mods designed specifically to enchance the building and transport experience for players in a survival or creative environment. The goal is to allow for creative expression while retaining the original, vanilla, challenge level of the base game. Have fun!

This modpack is modified and vetted by a two-person team based on our ideal vision of a building experience. Any suggestions and modifications are welcome! (but are subject to the same considerations, sorry)

Have any questions? Want a specific mod added or modified? Found any bugs or bad interactions? Please raise an issue in our GitHub repository here!

Most Recent Changelog (V1.3.0)

+ Added Traveler's Backpack
+ Added Create Escalated
+ Added Exposure
+ Added Create Enchantment Industry
+ Added Creeper Firework (as a mod patch for preventing blocking destruction from creeper explosions; previously the workaround used was to disable mob griefing entirely)

- Removed Immersive Melodies (Extremely annoying and practically useless)

~ Updated several mods including Valkyrien Skies 2, Immersive Aircraft, Create Interactive and Immersive Paintings
Current Status: As we were finalizing the modlist Create was finally updated to 6.0 on Fabric. Unfortunately, since it is newly updated, certain mods such as Steam n' Rails and VS2 are currently incompatible with it in its current form, so that major patch will have to wait until next time.
